digest.greeting: Jean, today closed several follow-through loops around TRACE, CoE capacity, and the MHE/RFE Angel-response thread. The remaining work is focused: finish the KPI SMART goals, update Jorge's project sheet, and keep the transition-plan items moving cleanly into tomorrow.

items.label: Confirmed the TRACE follow-on placement
items.detail: The TRACE follow-on is now closed for today: current TRACE should close or reach hypercare before the follow-on moves into prioritization.

items.label: Closed the CoE capacity follow-through
items.detail: The CoE capacity follow-through is complete, and the separate Mar/Jhara quick touchpoint was later canceled because the meeting was not needed.

items.label: Tracked the Angel response loop for MHE/RFE
items.detail: The Angel-response follow-up tied to Mar's MHE/RFE work is complete after today's Teams follow-through.

items.label: Turn the KPI set into SMART goals
items.detail: Keep this as the top carry-forward item. Shape the KPI set into a small, leadership-ready group of goals rather than a loose metric list.

items.label: Decide whether Mar gets PE support for MHE/RFE
items.detail: Mar has the MHE/RFE work and already gave Angel a July 3 update target. The remaining decision is whether to assign PE support before the team transition creates a capacity gap.

items.label: Update Jorge's project sheet for Jill's portfolio
items.detail: Finish the tracker update for Jill's June 30 portfolio meeting, including the active, rejected, completed, and IT-evaluation split.

items.label: Prepare Jorge's transition inputs
items.detail: Keep the schedules, approved time off, performance feedback, and skills or experience context together so the team-member handoff does not create follow-up churn.

items.label: Plan follow-ups for the July 1 team alignment
items.detail: Janet shared that Thiago, Gustavo, and Nico agreed the new alignment makes sense and that it will be effective July 1. Jean still needs to schedule follow-up time near the end of this week or early next week.

items.label: Quick Touchpoint with Mar and Jhara was canceled
items.detail: Outlook shows the quick touchpoint was canceled today with the note that the meeting was not needed.

items.label: 1:1 Santiago & Jean
items.detail: Regular 1:1 before the midday protected block.

items.label: Jean Midyear
items.detail: Midyear meeting with Sara Watson; Outlook still shows Jean has not responded.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: BCP/Incident Response touchpoint follows the midyear meeting and includes several legal and project stakeholders.

items.label: Eugenia & Jean PM/PE Transition Plan
items.detail: Transition conversation focused on Laura's projects, skills, and PM/PE movement.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team forum for project progress, blockers, and strategic initiative momentum.

items.label: IT Litify Sprint #13 Planning
items.detail: Sprint planning with IT Software, project managers, and stakeholders to review upcoming user stories.
